apps.name: Alist
apps.description: 支持多种存储的文件列表程序，支持 WebDAV
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  alist:
    image: xhofe/alist:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-alist
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:5244'
    volumes:
      - ./data:/opt/alist/data
    environment:
      - PUID=0
      - PGID=0
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: File Browser
apps.description: 轻量级 Web 文件管理器，支持文件上传、下载、编辑
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  filebrowser:
    image: filebrowser/filebrowser:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-filebrowser
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:80'
    volumes:
      - '{{root}}:/srv'
      - ./database:/database
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: Code Server
apps.description: 浏览器中运行的 VS Code，随时随地编写代码
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  code-server:
    image: codercom/code-server:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-code-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:8080'
    volumes:
      - ./data:/home/coder
    environment:
      - PASSWORD={{password}}
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: Portainer
apps.description: Docker 可视化管理工具，轻松管理容器和镜像
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  portainer:
    image: portainer/portainer-ce:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-portainer
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:9000'
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
      - ./data:/data
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: Nginx Proxy Manager
apps.description: 可视化 Nginx 反向代理管理，支持 SSL 证书自动申请
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  nginx-proxy-manager:
    image: jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-nginx-proxy-manager
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:81'
      - '{{httpPort}}:80'
      - '{{httpsPort}}:443'
    volumes:
      - ./data:/data
      - ./letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: Uptime Kuma
apps.description: 自托管的服务监控工具，支持多种监控方式和通知渠道
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  uptime-kuma:
    image: louislam/uptime-kuma:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-uptime-kuma
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:3001'
    volumes:
      - ./data:/app/data
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: Gitea
apps.description: 轻量级自托管 Git 服务，类似 GitHub 的代码托管平台
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  gitea:
    image: gitea/gitea:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-gitea
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:3000'
      - '{{sshPort}}:22'
    volumes:
      - ./data:/data
    environment:
      - USER_UID=1000
      - USER_GID=1000
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: Jellyfin
apps.description: 免费开源的媒体服务器，管理和串流你的影音内容
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  jellyfin:
    image: jellyfin/jellyfin:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-jellyfin
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:8096'
    volumes:
      - ./config:/config
      - ./cache:/cache
      - '{{mediaDir}}:/media'
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: FreshRSS
apps.description: 自托管的 RSS 阅读器，支持多用户和扩展
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  freshrss:
    image: freshrss/freshrss:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-freshrss
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:80'
    volumes:
      - ./data:/var/www/FreshRSS/data
      - ./extensions:/var/www/FreshRSS/extensions
    environment:
      - TZ=Asia/Shanghai
      - CRON_MIN=1,31
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: Memos
apps.description: 轻量级自托管备忘录，支持 Markdown 和标签管理
apps.author: webos
apps.composeTemplate:
services:
  memos:
    image: neosmemo/memos:{{version}}
    container_name: webos-app-memos
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - '{{port}}:5230'
    volumes:
      - ./data:/var/opt/memos
    networks:
      - webos-network

networks:
  webos-network:
    external: true

apps.name: Monaco 代码编辑器
apps.description: 基于 VS Code 内核的专业代码编辑器，支持语法高亮、智能提示、代码格式化等功能
apps.author: webos

apps.name: Telegram AI Bot
apps.description: Telegram 机器人接入 WebOS AI 助手，支持完整工具调用
apps.author: webos

apps.name: 飞书 AI Bot
apps.description: 飞书机器人接入 WebOS AI 助手，支持完整工具调用
apps.author: webos

configSchema.label: 飞书 Chat ID (群组 / 单聊)

skills.name: Excel 读取
skills.description: 读取和分析 Excel 文件内容，支持 .xlsx 和 .xls 格式
skills.author: webos

skills.name: 音乐搜索下载
skills.description: 从各大音乐网站下载音乐
skills.author: webos

skills.name: 视频搜索
skills.description: 从各大视频网站获取视频
skills.author: webos

skills.name: SearXNG 网络搜索
skills.description: 使用自建 SearXNG 元搜索引擎进行网络搜索，支持多类别搜索（通用、图片、新闻、IT、科学等）
skills.author: webos

skills.name: tmux 后台任务
skills.description: 使用 tmux 在后台执行耗时任务，支持进度查看和会话管理
skills.author: webos
